raw_body:
EMAIL US

International Removals in Bexhill

Mark Ratcliffe Moving are a dependable removals firm based in East Sussex who can move you abroad safely and efficiently.

How can we help you today?

Moves Abroad Made Easy

International Removals in Bexhill

If you or your business are moving abroad, either in Europe or further afield - Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage can help! We have worldwide agents in over 200 countries who are all dedicated to helping your move go ahead as effortlessly as possible. All of your belongings will be closely tracked from your port of discharge, through customs clearance and all the way to your new destination. We will be there to unwrap and set up all of your belongings, ready for you to start your new life abroad.

Moving abroad is a common occurance nowadays due to transport being accessible and there being an increased range of opportunities abroad. No matter what the reason may be, our team are more than happy to help you bring your belongings safely to your new destination. We are fully insured and qualified to handle any moving project. We prioritise customer service and always get the job done to the customer's exact specifications. Getting your possessions to your new location in excellent condition is our main priority, we handle them with extreme care and responsibility. We are proud to have gained an excellent reputation for providing professional removals, making the process as simple as possible for you and your family.

Removals, Storage and Packing

As soon as you enquire, we get to know your requirements and budget so that we can plan a detailed strategy to suit your needs. We transit your possessions via road, air and shipping - whichever route is the more effective. We also offer a packing service should this be a requirement - we safely and efficiently pack your belongings using our professional, reliable tools and materials. Or if you would prefer to pack your belongings yourself, we offer all of the high quality tools we use at our shop, which includes various sized cartons, plain paper, tissue paper, bubble wrap and 2" vinyl tape. We also can unpack your belongings once we have reached your new location. We also offer portable wardrobe cartons which keep your clothes crease free and clean.

We can help with your commercial international move too. We make sure all commercial moves run smoothly by providing A3 plastic stacking crates for files, trucks and dollies to cater for all. We offer furniture dismantling and reassembling should you require this service. We even offer storage options for all commercial and domestic clients, in warehouse containers or in storage rooms. On depository, a full inventory of all of your goods is taken and you will be charged by the day, so you only pay for the period you use the storage option for. We work on a flexible basis, and are available 7 days a week, so we are able to offer services on weekends and bank holidays if you require.

Testimonials

If you still aren't convinced, take a look at what Andrew had to say about his international move to Thailand with us:

"Dear Mark, Thank you for the excellent way that you transported all my belongings from Eastbourne to Sakon Nakhon, Thailand. Everything arrived in good condition and exactly in the timeframe that you had told me. The delivery company accepted that I changed the delivery address without any hassle so everything was delivered to my new home. The guys who delivered were excellent. They were very polite and courteous and spoke excellent English. I can thoroughly recommend your service which, for me, was efficient and worry free."

Take a look at more testimonials here.

For unbeatable customer service and unrivalled professionalism, look no further than Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage. We are proud to offer removals and storage at competitive prices, just contact us today for your free quote by calling 01323 848 008 or fill in the form at the top of this page.
